title: Fast and efficient exact synthesis of single qubit unitaries generated by Clifford and T gates
authors: V Kliuchnikov, D Maslov, M Mosca
abstract: In this paper, we show the equivalence of the set of unitaries computable by the circuits over the Clifford and T library and the set of unitaries over the ring , in the single-qubit case. We report an efficient synthesis algorithm, with an exact optimality guarantee on the number of Hadamard and T gates used. We conjecture that the equivalence of the sets of unitaries implementable by circuits over the Clifford and T library and unitaries over the ring holds in the -qubit case.
publication_info: V Kliuchnikov, D Maslov, M Mosca - arXiv preprint arXiv:1206.5236, 2012 - arxiv.org
